books.title: Some Useful Wild Plants
books.author: Dan Jason
books.description: A comprehensive guide to foraging and using wild plants for food, medicine, and other purposes.

books.title: Foxglove Journal
books.author: L. Rowan
books.description: A reflective guide to planting small habits and tracking moods like seeds in a garden.

books.title: The Coding Bard
books.author: Arlen Thorne
books.description: A whimsical journey through programming concepts told through stories, metaphors, and quiet moments of discovery.

books.title: Midnight at the Mintforge
books.author: Elowen Vale
books.description: A cozy tale of a developer who builds magical tools in a small workshop lit by moonlight and glowing monitors.

books.title: Driftwood Atlas
books.author: A. McQueen
books.description: A detailed accounting of various driftwood types, where they were found and through trial and error discovering what they are best suited for in the world of carpentry.

books.title: Seeds of Stillness
books.author: Rowan Hart
books.description: Small practices for slowing down, planting intentions, and tending the garden of everyday life.

books.title: Braces and Brackets
books.author: Juniper Clarke
books.description: A beginner-friendly exploration of programming logic wrapped in cozy metaphors and gentle lessons.

books.title: The Spruce & The Sparrow
books.author: A. Linden
books.description: A quiet woodland story about resilience, creativity, and building something meaningful from small beginnings.
